title: Medical Records Technician
description: HCA Healthcare is hiring a Medical Records Technician to maintain accurate and secure patient health records for our Cincinnati hospital facility. You will abstract medical information, ensure HIPAA compliance, organize records for quality review and legal matters, and support the clinical team by maintaining the integrity of patient documentation.
responsibilities: Abstract clinical information from medical records and enter into EHR systems
Organize and file medical records according to facility protocols
Verify completeness of medical records and identify missing documentation
Scan and digitize paper records for electronic storage
Prepare records for quality review, audits, and legal proceedings
Ensure confidentiality and comply with HIPAA regulations

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; medical records program completion preferred
skills: Data entry and attention to accuracy
Understanding of HIPAA and patient privacy
certifications: RHIT or RHIA certification preferred or in-progress

benefits: Tuition reimbursement for medical records certification
